payload.answer: Recall returned mem_new because it is the current, non-superseded memory for the Sam-from-Goldman context. mem_old was not returned as a current result because it has been superseded by mem_new. It may appear in the debug explanation only as a filtered historical record, not as an active fact.

entity_resolution.reason: The recall request was scoped to Sam from Goldman. Within that scope, mem_new was the current matching memory, while mem_old was excluded due to its superseded status.

memory_cards.statement: mem_new was returned for the query about Sam from Goldman because it is the active, non-superseded memory matching that entity context.
mem_old was filtered out because it is marked as superseded and should not be presented as the current fact.

details: Explained why mem_old was filtered as superseded.
Did not present the superseded memory as current.
